underlying_goal: Execute phase 1 of a GSD workflow (emergency security hardening) and update GSD tooling to latest version
friction_detail: Claude used tools from gsd-reflect instead of gsd, which the user caught and flagged.
brief_summary: User ran GSD phase execution (Wave 1 completed but Wave 2 was interrupted due to wrong tooling) and then updated GSD from v1.9.13 to v1.22.4 successfully.
